news.paragraph: Meta is introducing a new incognito mode for WhatsApp to enhance privacy for AI-driven conversations, marking a significant product update. Simultaneously, the company is navigating internal challenges including employee backlash over tracking software and potential further job cuts as part of an AI-focused efficiency pivot. Options traders should monitor how these product launches and organizational changes impact sentiment and volatility.
headlines: Meta launches WhatsApp 'incognito' mode to address privacy concerns for AI chats
Meta Faces Employee Backlash Over Mouse-Tracking Software
Meta to launch 'Incognito Chat' for private AI conversations on WhatsApp
Top Analyst Reports for Meta, Pfizer & Salesforce
